column1: Hey Chelsea, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
from march 7-11 that's the days we're planning to go
but our break is from march 7-15
Okay cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
bahamas or san juan Puerto Rico
Cool yea I can def help out with Bahamas. Puerto Rico isn't much of a college spring break location
How many ppl in your group?
cool I'll def hook it up for y'all. which school do you go to?
FAU! Dope yall gotta be havin a good time down there
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Loved “FAU! Dope yall gotta be havin a good time down there”
as soon as possible but i just need more info about price and also about the pay overtime on the website
hey okay cool yea I got you
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through
yes i got it ! do you have an idea whats the full price on both ?
wait nvm i see the quote one sec
i would do the 4 nights punta cana ,it says flights not included can we do one adding flight for extra ?
yea we can add flights. its def cheaper most of the time to get flights separately on your own. but if youd rather the convenience of having it all done in one I can def take a look
okay yeah can you take a look thanks
so if it's just the two of us i can't select 4 per room only 2 per room for $726?
spirit works or anything least price
yea we'd do the 2 person room for 2 ppl
if we get our own flights which airport would this be to?
I can help you find a good one, which airport you lookin to fly out of
dope, its cheaper for you to fly out of miami if you can make that shake. heres a good one https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/kBMcVT642fRJMk2Z6
thank you ! but actually i think we'll just get our own flights and fly out of fort lauderdale can you just help me check this is the correct airport right ?
and if we put our deposit down before tomorrow night will we get the $75 off our package deal
yup thats the correct airport, and yea I can honor that deal!
want me to set up the reservation for you for tomorrow?
yes! or tonight after i get off work we can put the deposit in
okay bet yea I'll send that rn with the $75 discount on top
just emailed over the reservation, lmk if you need any help with it when you get out of work
the total is $651 with the discount
i just reserved my spot how do i do the deposit ?
Cool. Are you logged into your account?
i've tried two different cards not sure why it keeps saying this
Hey sorry I missed this, not sure what's up there. All other info is entered correctly? Did you try logging out and back in
Sup Chels checkin in. Did it end up working for you? I can reset it manually on the back end to see if that works
i'm gonna try again right now idk why it kept saying errors last night i tried like 4 times
my roomates paying hers right now too
what time is check in and checkout

And yea check in is 3 check out 11. But, you can still come on the resort before 3. If rooms are ready you'll be able to check in any time. If not, you can still chill on the resort and drink, pool, etc
is it possible to be able to add more people on the trip or not but not totally fine
heyy my bad i knocked out but yea we can add more ppl in, how many you thinking?
prob just another 1 but we're not sure yet how much time we got ?
Yea I can add them in were they ready to deposit today?
i'm gonna confirm is their actually gonna come today
hey spiffy so it's just gonna be me and my roomate for the trip actually since the full amount is due jan 9 i was wondering if there was anyway we could get an extension on that?
yo! yea when'd you need til?
next friday the 16 is that possible

hey spiff i know our payments are over due as of last night but our paycheck got delayed till tuesday and we work together at the same place so could you please give us an extension till tuesday and then we'll definitely put the rest down !
Will put the note in to the team
hey spiff can we pay today ? i totally forgot yesterday it's still good right ?
yea all good I kept it all active for you
Word I see it y'all all good
does the package included transportation from the airport ?
yea! when youre logged in, add your flight info into the flight info tab. we'll schedule your transportation from there
gotchu thanks what else does the package include like any parties ?
yea includes all of the events that happen on the resort. like the foam party, beach party, and the nights at the resort nightclub

the off-resort events are a separate add on. those include round trip transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at the hosted nightclub nights. The venues are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Nightclub, and the Booze Cruise
hi spiff are we still able to add one more person or no
hey! potentially lemme check in and see!
Liked “hey! potentially lemme check in and see!”
hey whats up we're able to add! are they ready to hop on tonight?
hey did we still want to add the 3rd person to the trip
okay dope. if you can send her the link she can hop on its ready for her now
is it under my same link
yea looks like thats the current rate now
hey was she able to hop on
hey did you still need that space?
i don't think she will anymore it's a little expensive for her now sorry about that
if she joined a little earlier she would have been able to get the same rate
should we put our flight details in?
Chelsea! I just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
yes we did give me til tonight i'm gonna ask my roomate about it
i saw a party package that includes 4 things for $200 is that still available
Lemme see if I can still do that! It would be 3 events tho not 4
for example 2 nightclubs and the booze cruise
I can do the 3 events for $200! just lmk which 3
well do imagine, coco bongo, and booze cruise
okay bet, I'll add those in rn
those are all added in now
hey spiffy for the party package is there specific days for each like first day is this 2nd day is that

yo! yea I sent an email the other day with the lineup, did you get that? here are the party pass events Sunday March 8 - Coco Bongo Monday March 9 - Booze Cruise / Maroca Nightclub Tuesday March 10 - Imagine Cave And then there are events happening on the resort, like tonights a block party at 8:30 thats gonna be pretty dope
and safe travels today, see y'all out here soon
hey so we forgot to print out the vouchers... and we're almost at the airport
hey spiffy the imagine is 10:00 pickup today right
I'd get down there tho just so you're ready
oh we're ready i just saw on our voucher it says 10
Yea it's so that you don't miss the bus lol
do you know when the bus is back to the airport our flights at 4:45
Hey run down to the lobby and check with our on site staff for your shuttle time
